outreach_draft.subject: Gatekeeper Liability Recovery — Offshore Fraud Judgment — Seeking Contingency Counsel
outreach_draft.body:
Dear Mr. Rudman,

I am reaching out regarding a judgment monetization matter that may align with Robbins Geller's work in securities fraud and gatekeeper liability recovery.

Our client obtained a substantial default judgment against an offshore foreign corporation following adjudicated findings of fraud. The defendant has no reachable assets — direct enforcement is not viable. The recovery strategy focuses on gatekeeper liability: identifying auditors, underwriters, and other third-party gatekeepers whose professional failure enabled the fraud, and using that exposure to negotiate settlement.

Robbins Geller's record in auditor and underwriter gatekeeper actions — including the HP securities fraud appellate victory, the $200M Motorola recovery, and multiple landmark class recoveries — reflects direct familiarity with this recovery model. I would welcome a brief preliminary conversation to determine whether this matter is the kind your firm would consider.

No commitment is implied at this stage. I am happy to provide additional case details if you see potential fit.

Thank you for your time.

Sincerely,

Corporate X-Factor Operations
Judgment Monetization Group
corporatezfactor.com

optimizations_applied: Direct email found: SRudman@rgrdlaw.com (was: firm website contact)
Added $200M Motorola citation — more targeted than generic HP reference
Removed 'mutual NDA' language per outreach protocol
Corporate X-Factor signature with domain applied
